title: Alrix Da Costa
wikitext:
{{short description|France international rugby league footballer}} {{Use dmy dates|date=October 2024}} {{Infobox rugby league biography |name = Alrix Da Costa |fullname = |image = Alrix Da Costa.jpg |image_size = |position = {{rlp|HK}} |birth_date = {{Birth date and age|df=yes|1997|10|2}} |birth_place = [[Foix]], [[Ariège (department)|Ariège]],
[[Occitania (administrative region)|Occitania]], France |height = {{convert|1.76|m|ftin|abbr=on|order=flip}}{{cite web|url=http://www.catalansdragons.com/fiche-363-da-costa-alrix/|title=Dragons Catalans | Site Officiel|publisher=catalansdragons.com|accessdate=2016-07-10}} |weight = {{convert|86|kg|stlb|abbr=on|order=flip}} |club1 = [[Catalans Dragons]] |year1start = 2016 |year1end = present |appearances1 = 160 |tries1 = 11 |goals1 = 0 |fieldgoals1 = 0 |points1 = 44 |club2 = → [[Saint-Esteve XIII Catalan|Saint-Esteve]] |year2start = 2016{{small|(loan)}} |year2end = |appearances2 = 10 |tries2 = 0 |goals2 = 0 |fieldgoals2 = 0 |points2 = 0 |teamA = [[France national rugby league team|France]] |yearAstart = 2016 |yearAend = present |appearancesA = 10 |triesA = 2 |goalsA = 0 |fieldgoalsA = 0 |pointsA = 8 |teamB = [[France national rugby league team|France 9s]] |yearBstart = 2019 |yearBend = present |appearancesB = 3 |triesB = 1 |goalsB = 0 |fieldgoalsB = 0 |pointsB = 4 |new = yes |source = [https://www.loverugbyleague.com/stats/players/alrix-da-costa/ loverugbyleague][https://www.rugbyleagueproject.org/players/alrix-da-costa/summary.html RLP] |updated = 27 October 2025 }} '''Alrix Da Costa''' (born 2 October 1997) is a French professional [[rugby league]] footballer who plays as a {{rlp|hk}} for the [[Catalans Dragons]] in the [[Super League]] and [[France national rugby league team|France]] at international level. Da Costa has spent time on loan [[Saint-Esteve XIII Catalan|Saint-Esteve]] in the [[Elite One Championship]]. ==Background== Da Costa was born in [[Foix]], France. ==Club career== ===Catalans Dragons=== Da Costa came through the junior ranks at Catalans and represented France at junior level.{{cite web|url=http://www.lindependant.fr/2016/04/14/le-jour-j-pour-alrix-da-costa,2184666.php|title=Rugby à XIII / Super League : le jour J pour Alrix Da Costa avec les Dracs|publisher=lindependant.fr|accessdate=2016-07-10}} He made his Super League debut in the victory at [[St Helens R.F.C.|St Helens]] on 14 April 2016.{{Cite news|url=https://www.bbc.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/36027446|title = St Helens 12-30 Catalans|work = BBC Sport}} Da Costa missed Catalans [[2021 Super League Grand Final]] loss to [[St Helens RFC]] due to injury, however he was an integral member of the team which won the [[League Leaders Shield]] that season.{{cite web|url=https://www.totalrl.com/dragons-and-saints-name-unchanged-squads-for-grand-final/|title=Dragons and Saints name unchanged squads for Grand Final|website=www.totalrl.com|date=7 October 2021 }} Da Costa was limited to only ten matches with Catalans in the 2023 Super League season and missed their [[2023 Super League Grand Final]] loss against [[Wigan Warriors|Wigan]].{{cite news|url=https://www.theguardian.com/sport/2023/oct/14/catalans-dragons-wigan-super-league-grand-final-rugby-league-match-report/|title=Wigan Warriors crowned Super League champions after downing Dragons|newspaper=The Observer|date=14 October 2023 |last1=Bower |first1=Aaron }} ==International career== On 22 October 2016, Da Costa made his international debut for [[France national rugby league team|France]] in their [[2016 Rugby League Four Nations#France vs England|end of year test match]] against England in Avignon. He was selected in France 9s squad for the [[2019 Rugby League World Cup 9s]].{{cite web|date=2 October 2019|title=La liste des joueurs pour la Coupe du Monde dévoilée!|url=https://www.ffr13.fr/actualite-a-la-une/la-liste-des-joueurs-pour-la-coupe-du-monde-devoilee/|publisher=FFRXIII|accessdate=1 November 2019|language=French}}{{cite web|date=10 October 2019|title=XIII de France: Romain Puso remplace Lilian Albert, forfait!|url=https://www.ffr13.fr/actualite-a-la-une/xiii-de-france-romain-puso-remplace-lilian-albert-forfait/|publisher=FFR XIII|accessdate=1 November 2019|language=French}} ==References== {{Reflist|30em}} ==External links== *[http://www.catalansdragons.com/en/fiche-363-da-costa-alrix/ Catalans Dragons profile] *[https://www.superleague.co.uk/player/165/alrix%3Cbr-%3Eda-costa SL profile] *[https://www.ffr13.fr/joueur/alrix-da-costa/ France profile] *[https://www.nrl.com/players/rugby-league-world-cup/france/alrix-da-costa/ French profile] {{Catalans Dragons squad}} {{France 2021 Rugby League World Cup squad}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Da Costa, Alrix}} [[Category:1997 births]] [[Category:Living people]] [[Category:AS Saint Estève players]] [[Category:Catalans Dragons players]] [[Category:France national rugby league team players]] [[Category:French sportspeople of Portuguese descent]] [[Category:French rugby league players]] [[Category:People from Foix]] [[Category:Rugby league hookers]] [[Category:Rugby league players from Occitania (administrative region)]] [[Category:Sportspeople from Ariège (department)]] [[Category:21st-century French sportsmen]]
